info.title: Ali Text-to-Speech
info.description:
Ali channel text-to-speech capability for `/v1/audio/speech`. The project currently implements the official field subset for `qwen3-tts-instruct-flash` only.

This document intentionally includes only the implemented official fields: `model`, `input`, `voice`, `instructions`, `optimize_instructions`, `language_type`, and `stream_format`.

On the unified gateway surface, `stream_format` both enables streaming and carries the Ali upstream streaming format value. In other words, any non-empty `stream_format` is treated as a streaming request.

Project billing note: the gateway maps upstream `usage.characters` to unified `usage.prompt_tokens_details.audio_tokens`, keeps `usage.output_tokens` in `usage.completion_tokens_details.audio_tokens`, and uses the unified input audio characters for `quota_type=3` settlement.

post.description:
Call Ali `qwen3-tts-instruct-flash` through the unified `/v1/audio/speech` endpoint.

Response contract:
- non-streaming always returns `302 Found + Location`;
- streaming always returns `text/event-stream` and forwards Ali SSE payloads.

value.input: Introduce this product with a slightly faster speaking rate.
value.instructions: Speak faster with a brighter tone.

value.input: Today is a wonderful day to build something people love.

200.description: Streaming success. Returns Ali SSE payloads. For internal settlement, the gateway reads `usage.characters` as the unified input audio character count.

302.description: Non-streaming success. The `Location` header contains a temporary audio file URL. For internal settlement, the gateway reads `usage.characters` as the unified input audio character count.

optimize_instructions.description: Whether to optimize `instructions`. An explicit `false` is preserved.

stream_format.description: Streaming output format. Any non-empty value enables streaming on the unified endpoint; `pcm` is the common Ali value.
